title: Love's Humility
content:
As some rapt gazer on the lowly earth,
    Looks up to radiant planets, ranging far,
    So I, whose soul doth know thy wondrous worth
    Look longing up to thee as to a star.
meaning:
"Love's Humility" is a quintessential example of Paul Laurence Dunbar's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
